name: Five Iron Golf
address: 22-43 Jackson Ave, Long Island City, NY 11101
about: Five Iron Golf in Long Island City is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines state-of-the-art technology with a full-service bar and restaurant. It utilizes Trackman launch monitors in its simulator bays, offering access to over 200 virtual courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. The facility is designed for golfers of all skill levels, featuring a casual, no-dress-code atmosphere that aims to make the game accessible and entertaining. Pricing is structured as a mixed model, with hourly bay rentals available alongside a monthly membership option that provides free play and discounts on other services.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate data for serious practice and improvement
Access to a wide variety of world-class virtual golf courses, including prestigious PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu allow for a complete social and golfing experience
Flexible pricing model with options for both casual play and long-term membership benefits

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a chef-inspired menu, including wings, pizza, and other appetizers
Full-service bar with drink packages and specials available

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading launch monitor technology providing accurate data on ball flight, spin rate, swing speed, club path, and attack angle

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full-service kitchen and bar available for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing a full 18 holes typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the course and simulator wait times, but can vary.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf is kid-friendly and offers services like junior clinics and can host kids' birthday parties.
